repo.name: qml-agent-lab
repo.purpose: Agent-first research environment for Quantum Machine Learning with reproducible benchmarks, enforced classical baselines, honest performance reporting, structured contribution workflows, grounded evaluation/reputation tracking, and ontology-aware agent governance.
